name: Unicorn Riot
title: Government Says Terabytes of Signal Chats are Central to the Case Against Minnesota 15
snippet:
The Minnesota 15 case is about conversations, thousands of pages of it, harvested from encrypted group chats on Signal and loaded into an Everlaw database for prosecutors to build conspiracy charges against Trump's political opponents.
The post Government Says Terabytes of Signal

title: Then They Came for the Anarchists: Prairieland Defendants Sentenced to 562 Years
snippet:
According to federal prosecutors, the defendants were the members of a murderous “North Texas Antifa Cell.” The Prairieland defendants received over 562 years in federal prison -- the longest sentence a U.S. court has ever given to a group of political anarchist defendants.

name: Unicorn Riot
title: How Trans Healthcare in Greece is Pushed Outside the System
snippet:
